name: Chili Powder (Low Sodium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 3 tablespoons of paprika.
2. Add 2 teaspoons of finely crushed oregano.
3. Stir in 1 teaspoon of ground cumin.
4. Mix in 1 teaspoon of ground turmeric.
5. Incorporate 1 teaspoon of garlic powder.
6. Finally, add 1/4 teaspoon of cayenne pepper.
7. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
8. Use this mixture as a substitute for regular chili powder in your recipes.
Makes 4 tablespoons. Contains no salt as does bought chili powder.
